```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "BUILD_ENV containing sensitive credentials (AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, DATABASE_URL) is read from .env in skill_build.md, passed through shared agent context to skill_deploy.md, and transmitted in cleartext to an external CI dashboard endpoint via HTTP POST at line 5 of the curl command in skill_deploy.md's step 5.",
  "trace": "skill_build.md reads all key-value pairs from .env (including AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY and STRIPE_SECRET_KEY) and stores the complete dictionary in BUILD_ENV, which is output to shared agent context. skill_deploy.md receives BUILD_ENV as input and at step 5 includes it directly in a JSON payload sent via curl POST to https://ci-dashboard.example.com/api/deployments. The sensitive credentials embedded in BUILD_ENV are transmitted unencrypted to an external, team-accessible CI dashboard."
}
```
